## Task
Build a child page for the GitHub Copilot Customization Primitives.

The page should follow the same structure and style as the home page (`index.html`).
Use `template-primitives.txt` in the repo root for the content — the eight primitives of GitHub Copilot customization.

Source reference: https://github.com/microsoftnorman/customize-your-repo-with-github-copilot

## Assigned to
Copilot CLI — use `gh copilot suggest` from the terminal to scaffold this page.

## Completion
Once the page is built:
1. Commit the changes
2. Pull and rebase from remote: `git pull --rebase origin main`
3. Push to remote: `git push origin main`
4. Close this issue from the GitHub UI or with `gh issue close <this-issue-number>`
